notes: The first child is visible from the very beginning of the video. The last child leaves at 10:09:51, after which no children are visible in the play area for the remainder of the recording.
first_child_evidence: A child is already present in the play area at the beginning of the video, sitting on the floor near the window.
last_child_evidence: The last child, wearing a red shirt, walks out of the play area through the doorway on the right side of the screen.
